api_key.description: HighLevel API key, sent as the x-api-key header on every request. Never logged.

location_id.description: HighLevel location id every read is scoped to; sent as the locationId query param on every request.

base_url.description: HighLevel (LeadConnector proxy) API base URL override for tests or proxies.

api_version.description: Value sent as the Version header on every request (LeadConnector API version).
